citation.description: test_normalize_coverage_accepts_standard_runner_envelope_metadata sends a dict with records plus runner/model/trace_id/_usage fields and asserts disposition==finding rather than output-invalid

criteria.criterion: A valid production-shaped focused response with standard runner metadata yields its finding/consistent records rather than output-invalid.

citation.description: test_normalize_coverage_still_rejects_unknown_record_fields verifies that an unknown key (unexpected_inside_contract) inside the records payload produces indeterminate/output-invalid

criteria.criterion: Unknown fields inside the records payload remain rejected fail-closed.

citation.description: The existing test suite in test_plan_review_prerequisites.py includes test_indeterminate_coverage_records_have_no_findings, test_largest_window_exhaustion_emits_indeterminate, test_focused_general_index_domains_independent and other malformed-output and attribution tests. The normalization fix in prerequisites.py line 109 only strips the envelope before handing to the strict model_validate, leaving the extra-forbid validation of records intact.

criteria.criterion: Existing malformed-output and attribution tests remain green.
